Start a Conversation

For organizational leaders

AI is already inside your organization.

We give mission-driven organizations a clear path to adopt AI safely, build real capability, and lead their people through it—without losing trust, crediblity, or identity.

See the Path Start a Conversation

Who Movemental Serves

Tailored for mission-driven organizations.

We guide different types of organizations through the AI transition, meeting them where they are with custom training & tech.

Churches

Guiding congregations through theological implications, staff efficiency, and ethical deployment in ministry contexts.

Find out more arrow_forward

Nonprofits

Helping mission-driven entities scale impact, automate back-office operations, and maintain donor trust.

Find out more arrow_forward

Institutions

Providing networks and large agencies with systematic frameworks, governance, and enterprise-level solutions.

Find out more arrow_forward

The Movemental AI Path

A clear path for leading your organization through AI.

Most organizations jump straight to tech, or freeze in place. Movemental's path is clear, human-first, and rooted in safety.

Stage 01

Safety Documentation

Produces

AI use & trust charters.

Status Check

Team knows approved tools & safe data protocols.

Risk

Shadow AI spreads; ethical breaches increase.

Stage 02

Sandbox Discovery

Produces

Valuable use cases & ethical considerations

Status Check

Prioritized list of high-impact, low-risk AI areas.

Risk

Wasted time on tools that miss bottlenecks.

Stage 03

Skills Development

Produces

Wise & skilled AI leadership.

Status Check

Staff confident in prompting & quality assessment.

Risk

Poor outputs lead to project abandonment.

Stage 04

Solutions Deployment

Produces

Custom agentic platforms built for your org or network.

Status Check

Proprietary knowledge safely integrated into daily workflows.

Risk

Generic models lack your unique voice.

Start with Safety

Built with and shaped by movement leaders.

Movemental is a growing conversation among leaders navigating AI, formation, and mission in real time.

"Credibility in an AI-saturated world is increasingly relational."

Founders

  • Brad Brisco Co-Founder
  • Alan Hirsch Co-Founder
  • Joshua Shepherd Co-Founder

Movement Voices

  • Rich Robinson Catalyse Change
  • Dave Ferguson Exponential
  • Brian Sanders Underground Network
  • Deb Hirsch Forge International
  • Michael Frost Morling College
  • Jeff Vanderstelt Soma
  • Hugh Halter Brave Cities

The path is being walked.

Movemental is two months old. Movement leaders across the missional and church-planting world have begun the path. Youthfront, a youth-development organization in Kansas City, completed Sandbox Discovery across ten teams in our first month of operation.

Engagements completing. Voices joining. Networks beginning to form.

When it comes to AI, we're all beginners and no one asked for this.

Lead Anyway. • STart With safety. • Build for Movement.
